__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: Coulombic efficiency (CE) after 200 cycles in carbonate electrolyte, Li||Cu half-cell

operating_conditions.rate: 1 mA/cm^2 plating / 1 mA/cm^2 stripping, 1 mAh/cm^2 areal capacity

model_caveat: Universal FFs do NOT directly predict Coulombic efficiency — CE is a cell-level integral over SEI evolution + dendrite nucleation kinetics + electrolyte decomposition. The 99.4% value here is a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: state-of-the-art lab-cell CE for FEC + LiNO3-stabilized Li || 3D-Cu cells. ALIGNN's notional contribution is electronic-structure-on-Li-surface input that downstream MD + interface-modeling would consume. PROXY ONLY.
proxy_source: Cui group (Stanford) 2018 Nat. Energy 3:739 (3D-host Li-metal CE 99.1% over 100 cycles, FEC additive) + Bao et al. 2019 Nat. Energy (LiF-rich SEI, 99.5% CE over 200 cycles in carbonate + LiNO3) + Tesla 4680 anode-free Li-metal early-life CE benchmarks (UNVERIFIED at production scale beyond pilot)
falsifier_text: CE < 99.5% after 500 cycles in carbonate OR dendrite penetration → FAIL
unproven_markers_preserved: Li-metal SEI HARD_WALL — SEI instability remains the dominant failure mode in carbonate electrolyte (Xu 2014 + Cui 2017 reviews)
full-cell vs half-cell CE gap typically 1-2% — falsifier targets full-cell evidence
500-cycle ≥ 99.5% target UNVERIFIED at any commercial cell scale 2026
honesty_caveats: Proxy 99.4% CE @ 200 cycles is short of the F-BAT-ANODE-1 target (99.5% @ 500 cycles) on BOTH axes — explicit AT-RISK classification. The CE gap of 0.1 pp at half the cycle count compounds badly (CE × N is the cumulative metric; 99.4%^500 ≈ 4.9% Li remaining vs 99.5%^500 ≈ 8.2%). SEI HARD_WALL preserved. Cell engineering → hexa-energy per CROSS_LINK §3.3. SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED.
license_note: Peer-reviewed paper values per CC-BY publisher terms; vendor authority SES AI / Cuberg / Solid Power / QuantumScape (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
